title: Alkonost limited summons a matching Alkonost from hand or deck

card.rawText: During your turn, you may summon a 'Harpy' or 'Alkonost' from your deck or hand as a Limited Summon. For each, add +1 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier to this card. Return Limited Summons to your hand if this creature leaves the field or this effect is negated.

effect.target: Harpy or Alkonost from deck or hand

plan.title: Alkonost limited summons a matching Alkonost from hand or deck
plan.summary: Activate Alkonost and verify it can summon a matching Alkonost as a source-linked Limited Summon.

notes: Place Alkonost on player_1 field as primary.
Keep Harpy available in player_1 hand or deck as the matching Limited Summon target.

steps: Choose a Harpy or Alkonost from deck or hand.
Verify the matching card enters as a Limited Summon.
manualVerification: The target set should be limited to Harpy or Alkonost from hand/deck.
riskNotes: The Gen 2 data set currently has Alkonost but no separate Harpy source card, so this fixture uses a second Alkonost copy.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_046_alkonost-046-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
